offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 orders/week, manual tracking causes stockouts. We help monitor inventory levels.
problem: Inability to maintain optimal inventory levels leads to stockouts and lost sales.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Indie Hackers posts discussing inventory solutions
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Community forums where sellers share tools
try_it: Let users try weekly inventory reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
